channel.title: InYourBones — Bay Area Radar (short_term)
channel.description: Curated upcoming Bay Area shows from InYourBones.

item.title: Lewis Capaldi @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-05-04 02:00 — Lewis Capaldi at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley. Lewis Capaldi's powerful vocals and emotional songwriting have made him a standout in the pop scene, ensuring a memorable live experience.

item.title: Said the Sky @ Bill Graham Civic Auditorium
item.description: 2026-04-26 02:30 — Said the Sky at Bill Graham Civic Auditorium. Said the Sky is known for his captivating electronic performances, blending emotional melodies with energetic beats.

item.title: Charlie Puth @ Bill Graham Civic Auditorium
item.description: 2026-05-02 02:30 — Charlie Puth at Bill Graham Civic Auditorium. Charlie Puth's catchy pop hits and impressive vocal range promise an engaging live show.

item.title: The Brook & The Bluff @ The Fillmore
item.description: 2026-04-26 03:00 — The Brook & The Bluff at The Fillmore. The Brook & The Bluff's unique blend of indie and folk elements creates a captivating live atmosphere.

item.title: The Wood Brothers @ The Fillmore
item.description: 2026-05-06 03:00 — The Wood Brothers at The Fillmore. The Wood Brothers are celebrated for their dynamic live performances and rich harmonies, appealing to roots music fans.

item.title: Yebba @ The Fillmore
item.description: 2026-05-07 03:00 — Yebba at The Fillmore. Yebba's soulful voice and emotional depth make her live shows a must-see for fans of contemporary R&B.

item.title: Oh Wonder @ Fox Theater - Oakland
item.description: 2026-04-30 03:00 — Oh Wonder at Fox Theater - Oakland. Oh Wonder's intimate and atmospheric performances resonate well with their dedicated fanbase.

item.title: Good Kid @ Fox Theater - Oakland
item.description: 2026-05-07 03:00 — Good Kid at Fox Theater - Oakland. Good Kid's unique sound and engaging stage presence make their show a promising experience.

item.title: Waxahatchee @ The Masonic
item.description: 2026-05-06 02:30 — Waxahatchee at The Masonic. Waxahatchee's blend of indie rock and personal storytelling creates a compelling live performance.

item.title: Hatsune Miku @ San Jose Civic
item.description: 2026-04-23 03:00 → 2026-04-24 03:00 — Hatsune Miku at San Jose Civic. Hatsune Miku's virtual performances attract a dedicated fanbase, making for a unique concert experience.

item.title: Florence + The Machine @ Chase Center
item.description: 2026-05-16 02:30 — Florence + The Machine at Chase Center. Demi Lovato's powerful vocals and emotional performances make her concerts a must-see.

item.title: James Blake @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-06-12 02:00 — James Blake at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley. James Blake's innovative sound and emotional depth promise a captivating live show.

item.title: Bob Dylan @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-06-14 02:00 — Bob Dylan at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley. Bob Dylan's legendary status and timeless songs ensure a significant live music experience.

item.title: Bob Moses @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-07-18 02:30 — Bob Moses at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley. Rainbow Kitten Surprise's eclectic style and energetic performances create a vibrant concert atmosphere.

item.title: Young the Giant @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-07-20 01:00 — Young the Giant at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley. Young the Giant's engaging live shows and anthemic songs resonate with a wide audience.

item.title: Alabama Shakes @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-05-30 03:00 — Alabama Shakes at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley. Alabama Shakes' soulful sound and powerful performances make their concerts a highlight for fans.

item.title: Levity @ Bill Graham Civic Auditorium
item.description: 2026-05-10 02:00 — Levity at Bill Graham Civic Auditorium. Levity presents a unique event that combines music and performance art, appealing to diverse audiences.

item.title: The Coverups @ Fox Theater - Oakland
item.description: 2026-05-03 03:00 — The Coverups at Fox Theater - Oakland.
